_comment: Curated demo set for the Collabhost stage instance (card #443).
Data-driven: deploy-stage.sh's seed (seed-demo-apps.sh) reads this file and
registers every app whose slug is not already present (register-if-absent,
idempotent). The FINAL curated selection is a Dana/Bill call (it drives the
#440 screenshots) -- this is a sensible placeholder covering every distinct
dashboard row shape. Edit/add/remove entries here; no script change needed.
slug, displayName, appType   -- registration identity + type
artifactSource               -- dir under stage/demo-apps/ copied to /srv/stage/<slug> (omit for route-only types)
artifactSubpath              -- subdir of the copied tree that is the artifact (e.g. a build output dir)
build                        -- shell command run in the copied dir AS the stage user (omit if none)
requires                     -- space-separated tools that must be on PATH; if absent the app is skipped with a warning
values                       -- registration overrides (section -> field -> value); '{artifact}' resolves to the absolute on-box artifact path
